name: PABLO
notes: Identified in KSE Shadow Fleet Tracker. Transported Russian Urals crude.

name: ANDROMEDA STAR
notes: Identified transporting Iranian crude. OFAC designated.

name: LANA
notes: Seized by Iran in April 2023. Used for Iranian crude transfers.

name: NEPTUNE
notes: KSE shadow fleet. Multiple Russian port calls 2023-2024.

name: TURBA
notes: Iranian crude carrier. Multiple AIS dark events in Gulf of Oman.

name: RIDGEBURY JOHN B
notes: KSE tracker. Loaded at Novorossiysk multiple times post-sanctions.

name: NEW GLORY
notes: Chinese-operated, Cook Islands flag. Iranian crude to Chinese refineries.
